expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created (commit count = starting count + 1)
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows 5 commits — 4 setup commits (Add user model, Wire up login route, Issue access tokens on login, Write auth integration tests) plus the new 68631fe. Setup started with 4, now 5.

expectations.text: The new commit is NOT empty — it has a non-zero diff
expectations.evidence: session-transcript.txt line 395: '4 files changed, 50 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)'

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: Subject 'Wire JWT refresh endpoint and extract token validation middleware' = 64 characters (commit-full.txt line 2)

expectations.text: Commit subject begins with an imperative verb (Add, Wire, Extract, Refactor, Implement, etc.)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 2 begins with 'Wire JWT refresh endpoint...'

expectations.text: Commit subject has no trailing period
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 2 ends with 'middleware' — no period

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
Commit body has a '## What happened' section with multiple sentences (not a single line)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 11: '## What happened' followed by ~25 lines of multi-paragraph narrative (lines 12-39)

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Files touched' section listing changed files
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 41: '## Files touched' followed by bullets for src/routes/auth.ts, src/middleware/jwt.ts, README.md, .claude/settings.json

expectations.text: Commit body mentions all three modified paths: src/routes/auth.ts, src/middleware/jwt.ts, README.md
Commit body mentions JWT or refresh endpoint in the narrative
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 5: 'Wired up the missing /api/refresh endpoint in src/routes/auth.ts'; 'JWT' in subject and throughout body

expectations.text: Commit body explains WHY the middleware was extracted (mentions circular import or similar reasoning carried from the user's message)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt lines 19-23: 'created a circular import: routes/auth.ts already imports from lib/db.ts... Moved the helpers to src/middleware/jwt.ts instead, which sits on the right side of the dependency graph and breaks the cycle.'

expectations.text: Commit body total length is at least 400 characters (rich narrative, not a one-liner)
expectations.evidence: Body spans lines 4-66 of commit-full.txt — well over 2000 characters of narrative including Summary, What happened, Files touched, State sections

expectations.text: Commit has 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>' trailer matching repo style
All three changed files are in the new commit
expectations.evidence: session-transcript.txt lines 397-398: 'create mode 100644 README.md / create mode 100644 src/middleware/jwt.ts' plus modified src/routes/auth.ts in the staging output (line 319)

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt line 2: 'nothing to commit, working tree clean'
session-transcript.txt line 421: 'Not pushed. Run git push when ready.' — no git push command in the transcript

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u' (mentions in compliance/rule notes do NOT count — only count actual command invocations like a bash tool call running that exact command)
expectations.evidence: Only git add invocation is line 311: 'git add src/routes/auth.ts src/middleware/jwt.ts README.md .claude/settings.json' — explicit paths. Line 443 is a compliance checklist mention, not an invocation.

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked --no-verify, --no-gpg-sign, or git commit --amend (mentions in compliance/rule notes do NOT count — only count actual command invocations)
expectations.evidence: Grep finds these strings only on lines 27 (skill rule recap), 401 (post-commit summary 'No --amend, no --no-verify.'), 441-442 (compliance checklist) — never in an actual bash invocation.

expectations.text: No logs/ directory was created (this skill doesn't write parallel JSON files)
expectations.evidence: session-transcript.txt shows no mkdir logs or write to logs/. Only directories created were .claude/ (line 230) and the outputs/ dir for the eval (line 428).
